name: M2S Electronics
message: At M2S Electronics, we are committed to improving the world around us and doing business the right way.The right way for our employees, for our suppliers and partners, for our customers and for the communities in which we live and work.M2S is partnering with manufacturers located in North America, offering electronic value-added subcontracting, designed to meet the customer’s expectations.In accordance with our values: Progress, Control and Harmony.
